name: @radzor/wallet-connect
description: Connect to Ethereum wallets (MetaMask, WalletConnect) for Web3 dApps. Client-side only.

inputs.name: chainId
inputs.description: Target chain ID (default: 1 for Ethereum mainnet).

outputs.name: walletInfo
outputs.type: { address: string; chainId: number; balance: string }
outputs.description: Connected wallet address, current chain, and ETH balance.

events.name: onConnected
events.description: Fired when a wallet is connected.

events.name: onChainChanged
events.description: Fired when the user switches chains.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on connection or transaction error.

actions.name: connect
actions.description: Request wallet connection via MetaMask or injected provider.

actions.name: getBalance

params.name: address
params.description: Wallet address to query. Defaults to connected address.

actions.description: Get ETH balance in wei as a hex string.

actions.name: sendTransaction

params.name: tx
params.type: { to: string; value?: string; data?: string; gas?: string }

actions.description: Send an ETH transaction. Returns the transaction hash.

actions.name: signMessage

params.name: message
params.description: Message to sign (displayed to the user in the wallet).

actions.description: Sign a message with the connected wallet. Returns the hex signature.

llm.constraints: Browser-only — requires window.ethereum injected by MetaMask or similar. Not available in Node.js or SSR. Always handle the case where no wallet is installed.
